evals.prompt: Find and scout inputs for a trade-up under R5 with difficulty at most 4. Focus on one with tight float constraints that will require persistent pagination. IMPORTANT: Skill has NO page limit. Page as far as needed (50+ pages OK) until goal or price ceiling.
evals.expected_output: Scouts all inputs with UNLIMITED pagination (no page 15 limit). Pages 50+ if needed. Logs every page. Only stops when: goal reached OR all items exceed price.

evals.prompt: Scout MP9 | Sand Dashed (Minimal Wear) with max price R1.00. This is a cheap skin — you'll need to page through many expensive listings to find good floats.
evals.expected_output: Pages aggressively (25+ pages), logs every page, eventually hits price ceiling or collects goal. Does not stop before page 20.

evals.prompt: Scout an item where price ceiling is quickly hit (try to find something under R0.50). Verify we stop correctly when all listings exceed price.
evals.expected_output: Detects price ceiling, stops pagination with clear message, does not continue needlessly
